title: Chief of Staff Fresh Start and Intelligent Source Monitoring
summary: Delivered the fresh-start operational slice: stale Kent state reset, legacy Gmail overlap stopped, Gmail freshness guarded, source ownership repaired, and Chief of Staff ensure automation added.
next_action: Follow-on phase: add richer MCP/provider tools for Gmail thread fetch, Slack thread history, Calendar details, and Telegram feedback learning.
resume_context: Implementation is committed-ready after precommit. Production still needs the final deploy, ensure endpoint call, refresh trigger, dashboard/todo verification, and Telegram completion notice.

history.summary: Recorded implementation contract for Kent's Chief of Staff fresh start.
Implemented reset controls, freshness guard, user-scoped agent updates, subscription sync hardening, and Chief of Staff ensure endpoint.
Marked the operational spec done; MCP/provider tool expansion remains a follow-on phase.
